## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Kathryn Cook (CMO, Alloy) and Marcel Santilli (GrowthX) to discuss AI-powered content strategy and potential collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content strategy and production, with human expertise in the loop](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [8-week strategy sprint ($20k) followed by ongoing growth execution ($15-20k/mo)](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
  - [Alloy interested in exploring partnership to refresh content strategy and improve ROI](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1861.0)
  - [Next step: Follow-up demo/Q\&A with Kathryn's team (Kelly, KJ) week of July 28th](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=2228.0)

## Topics

### Alloy's Current Content Situation

  - [CMO for 1 year, fintech/financial services background](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [1 full-time content person, longstanding agency relationship](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [200+ existing pages, questioning spend/ROI on traditional content approach](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1779.0)
  - [Noticing increase in Gen AI as lead source (e.g., Perplexity, ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)

### GrowthX's Approach

  - [AI workflows + human expertise (e.g., ex-TechCrunch, Shopify comms leads)](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Context engineering: Company artifacts inform AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [Rapid production: 14 articles in 5 weeks for new client](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
  - [Comprehensive strategy: SEO, editorial, tools/calculators, programmatic pages](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)
  - [Cost-effective: \~10 cents/word, often half the cost of traditional agencies](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=2018.0)

### GrowthX's Process

  - [8-week strategy sprint ($20k total)](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)
  - [Ongoing growth execution ($15-20k/month starting)](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Daily publishing (1+ piece/day minimum)](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1808.0)
  - [Balance of new content creation and existing content refresh](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1798.0)
  - [Adaptable to regulated industries (e.g., fintech, healthcare)](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)

### Client Examples

  - [Engine.com (group travel): 14 articles in 5 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
  - [Ramp: Vendor tools, per diem calculators, expense categories](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [Webflow: Integration pages, developer site overhaul](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)
  - [SentinelOne, Okta, Outreach, Udemy (recent/upcoming clients)](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=2122.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to schedule follow-up demo/Q\&A with Kathryn's team (Kelly, KJ)](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
  - [Target week of July 28th for follow-up meeting](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=2248.0)
  - [If moving forward, potential late September/October start for 8-week strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [Kathryn to consider internal alignment and procurement process timing](https://fathom.video/share/J_GQcR3qXZKWAQb11EGwtL3KQu3wq_yo?tab=summary&timestamp=2116.0)
